unverified_claims.note: Derived from unit shipment estimates across multiple analyst reports (2M units 2021 era → 20M projected 2026). No single-source 5-year revenue CAGR figure covers this exact window cleanly.

Estimated from EssilorLuxottica quarterly earnings trend data (Q3 2025: +11.7% QoQ with wearables contributing 4+ percentage points) and Counterpoint Research 110% YoY H1 2025 shipment data. No single-quarter figure directly cited.
Estimated from Accio.com normalized trend index (score 100 in August 2025 for 'smart glasses'). No Google Keyword Planner data directly available; figure is an approximation.

unverified_claims.claim: Market share for Rokid, Brilliant Labs, RealWear
unverified_claims.note: No analyst report cited specific share percentages for these three companies. Positions described qualitatively based on product characteristics and deployment reports.

unverified_claims.claim: Adoption: 4% to 17% of U.S. online adults (Forrester)
